feature_seasonal_events_enabled.description: Enables seasonal themed content and decorations

feature_voice_clone_enabled.description: Enables parent voice cloning for Lyalya. Off by default until APNs key is configured.

feature_realtime_lipsync_enabled.description: Enables real-time lip sync overlay on Lyalya mascot. Off by default — requires performance testing on low-end devices.

feature_spectrogram_enabled.description: Enables real-time spectrogram visualisation in LessonPlayer

feature_emotion_detection_enabled.description: Enables on-device facial emotion detection via ARKit blendshapes

feature_speaker_verification_enabled.description: Enables speaker verification to confirm child identity before session

feature_qwen_kid_circuit.description: Enables Qwen2.5-1.5B on-device LLM in kid narration circuit. Off by default — large model (~1.2 GB) requires explicit download.

lyalya_voice_default.description: Default Lyalya voice variant: pro | base | cloned

daily_reminder_time.description: Default daily reminder time in HH:mm format (local device time)

weekly_summary_day.description: Day of week for weekly summary push notification (lowercase English)

parent_summary_day.description: Day of week when parent receives progress summary (sunday | monday ... saturday)

onboarding_skip_allowed.description: Whether the onboarding flow can be skipped. Disable for A/B testing mandatory onboarding.

demo_mode_steps.description: Number of demo mode steps shown to unauthenticated users before paywall

max_session_duration_min.description: Maximum allowed session duration in minutes. Fatigue detection triggers soft stop at this value.

min_app_version.description: Minimum supported app version. Users below this will see a soft update prompt.

force_update_min_version.description: Hard minimum: users below this version cannot use the app until they update.
